revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:12 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:12月2日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 12월 2일]][[zh-min-nan:12 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十二月初二]][[zh:十二月初二]]
{{Not to be confused with|December 2|qq=December 2}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十二月初二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 12월 2일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar December|qq=}} '''December 2''' is the 2nd day of month {{ill|Layue|en|Layue|qid=Q905470|lt=December (Shiwasu)|1=Layue}} the 12th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|qid=Q96759839|1=senshū}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}} . == Events == * {{ill|Chōroku|en|Chōroku|qid=Q1193524|lt=Chōroku|1=Chōroku}} 1st Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1457|en|1457|qid=Q6518|lt=1457 AD|1=1457}} {{ill|December 27|en|December 27|qid=Q2800|lt=December 27|1=December 27}} ) – The {{ill|Chōroku Incident|ja|長禄の変|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chōroku Incident|1=Chōroku incident|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11653526}} occurs. * {{ill|Kōka|en|Kōka|qid=Q1325317|lt=Kōka|1=Kōka}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1845|en|1845|qid=Q7636|lt=1845 AD|1=1845}} {{ill|January 9|en|January 9|qid=Q2238|lt=January 9|1=January 9}} ) – Due to disasters such as the Edo Castle fire, the era is changed from {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} to Kōka. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1872|en|1872|qid=Q7753|lt=1872 AD|1=1872}} {{ill|December 31|en|December 31|qid=Q2912|lt=December 31|1=December 31}} ) – Japan’s calendar system is switched the next day from the old lunisolar calendar ({{ill|Solar–Lunar calendar|ja|太陽太陰暦|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Solar–Lunar calendar|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 太陰太陽暦|1=Lunisolar calendar|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q194235}} , {{ill|Tenpō calendar|en|Tenpō calendar|qid=Q1066717|lt=Tenpō calendar|1=Tenpō calendar}} ) to the new solar calendar ({{ill|Solar calendar|en|Solar calendar|qid=Q210953|lt=Solar calendar|1=Solar calendar}} , Gregorian calendar), resulting in New Year’s Eve occurring 28 days earlier. == Births == * {{ill|Kaibō|ja|開宝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaibō|1=Kaibao|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11065725}} 1st Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|968|en|968|qid=Q23918|lt=968 AD|1=968}} {{ill|December 23|en|December 23|qid=Q2676|lt=December 23|1=December 23}} ) – {{ill|Zhao Heng|ja|趙恒|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhao Heng|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 真宗 (宋)|1=Emperor Zhenzong|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q7475}} (of the Shinshu school), the 3rd Emperor of the {{ill|Northern Song Dynasty|ja|北宋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Northern Song Dynasty|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Northern Song (960–1127)|qid=Q319460}} (d. {{ill|1022|en|1022|qid=Q19261|lt=1022 AD|1=1022}} ). * {{ill|Kenkyū|en|Kenkyū|qid=Q1193933|lt=Kenkyū|1=Kenkyū}} 6th Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1196|en|1196|qid=Q19747|lt=1196 AD|1=1196}} {{ill|January 3|en|January 3|qid=Q2156|lt=January 3|1=January 3}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Tsuchimikado|en|Emperor Tsuchimikado|qid=Q357269|lt=Tsuchimikado Tennō|1=Emperor Tsuchimikado}} , the 83rd Emperor (d. {{ill|1231|en|1231|qid=Q5417|lt=1231 AD|1=1231}} ). * {{ill|Kagen|en|Kagen|qid=Q1327409|lt=Kayuan|1=Kagen}} 1st Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1304|en|1304|qid=Q5619|lt=1304 AD|1=1304}} {{ill|January 9|en|January 9|qid=Q2238|lt=January 9|1=January 9}} ) – {{ill|Hōjō Takatoki|en|Hōjō Takatoki|qid=Q2355334|lt=Hōjō Takatoshi|1=Hōjō Takatoki}} , the 14th Regent of the {{ill|Kamakura shogunate|en|Kamakura shogunate|qid=Q736839|lt=Kamakura Shogunate|1=Kamakura shogunate}} (d. {{ill|1333|en|1333|qid=Q6004|lt=1333 AD|1=1333}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 14th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1844|en|1844|qid=Q7633|lt=1844 AD|1=1844}} {{ill|January 21|en|January 21|qid=Q2273|lt=January 21|1=January 21}} ) – {{ill|Numa Morikazu|en|Numa Morikazu|qid=Q3373136|lt=Numama Moriichi|1=Numa Morikazu}} , a retainer, politician, and journalist (d. {{ill|1890|en|1890|qid=Q7832|lt=1890 AD|1=1890}} ). * {{ill|Kaei|en|Kaei|qid=Q1146125|lt=Kaei|1=Kaei}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1853|en|1853|qid=Q7666|lt=1853 AD|1=1853}} {{ill|January 11|en|January 11|qid=Q2247|lt=January 11|1=January 11}} ) – {{ill|Tokai Sanshi|en|Tokai Sanshi|qid=Q3091466|lt=Tōkai Sanshi|1=Tokai Sanshi}} , a novelist and politician (d. {{ill|1922|en|1922|qid=Q2165|lt=1922 AD|1=1922}} ). * {{ill|Man'en|en|Man'en|qid=Q1193862|lt=Man'en|1=Man'en}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1861|en|1861|qid=Q7693|lt=1861 AD|1=1861}} {{ill|January 12|en|January 12|qid=Q2248|lt=January 12|1=January 12}} ) – {{ill|Hanai Momosui|ja|半井桃水|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanai Momosui|1=Nakarai Tōsui|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1963962}} , a novelist and mentor to {{ill|Ichiyō Higuchi|en|Ichiyō Higuchi|qid=Q237948|lt=Ichiyō Higuchi|1=Ichiyō Higuchi}} (d. {{ill|1926|en|1926|qid=Q5259|lt=1926 AD|1=1926}} ). == Deaths == * {{ill|Shōhō|en|Shōhō|qid=Q1146192|lt=Shōhō|1=Shōhō}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1646|en|1646|qid=Q6930|lt=1646 AD|1=1646}} {{ill|January 18|en|January 18|qid=Q2265|lt=January 18|1=January 18}} ) – {{ill|Hosokawa Tadaoki|en|Hosokawa Tadaoki|qid=Q1147154|lt=Hosokawa Tadaoki|1=Hosokawa Tadaoki}} {{Sfn|Nagao|p=178|qq=}} , a military commander and husband of {{ill|Hosokawa Gracia|en|Hosokawa Gracia|qid=Q256864|lt=Hosokawa Gracia|1=Hosokawa Gracia}} (born {{ill|1563|en|1563|qid=Q6629|lt=1563 AD|1=1563}} ).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|12|1|12|3|11|2|1|12|1202|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
